outreach_messages.name: Berkshire Industrial OP Initial Reach Out
outreach_messages.body:
{firstName},
Hope all is well. I know we have not connected before, but I was hoping to chat if you can make the time. Lancor's headhunting practice is focused specifically on building out portfolio operations teams for PE firms. To that effect, I may have something interesting to run by you. I’d love your thoughts on it.

We are working on an Operating Partner project for Berkshire Partners. They are looking for a seasoned operating partner to join the Portfolio Support Group and work specifically with investments arising out of its Industrials sector. I would love to run it by you. Let me know if we can chat. Thanks!
